series_metadata.series_description: The System Backups Test Data Files are copies of test data files for applications that reside on the open systems environment (e.g. not the mainframe) needed to restore a system in case of a disaster or inadvertent destruction.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Retain daily backups 4 days onsite for all test environments except for the performance test environment for the external website. Retain daily backups 14 days onsite for performance test environment external website., Electronic: Delete
